title: Simon Eskildsen on scaling Shopify, building turbopuffer, and the future of databases
summary: Simon Eskildsen, CEO of turbopuffer, discusses lessons from scaling Shopify infrastructure, why new database companies emerge every 15 years, current limitations of AI coding agents, and the challenge of hiring top-tier engineers in the AI era. The conversation covers infrastructure evolution, database market dynamics, and the qualities that define exceptional engineers.
